changes.comment: evm/fallback: downstream sources are now plain tagged config objects ({type: 'portal'|'rpc'|'source', name?, ...}) instead of builder classes. The fallback constructs each source at build() from the shared field selection + query. BREAKING: removes EvmPortalDataSourceBuilder, EvmRpcDataSourceBuilder, and the EvmDownstreamSourceBuilder interface; adds the EvmFallbackSourceConfig type. For a single non-fallback source use DataSourceBuilder (evm) or evmRpcStream (evm/rpc) directly.
